title: Leninsk-Kuznetskiy Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Leninsk-Kuznetskiy with a Z-Score of -4.06. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Leninsk-Kuznetskiy are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 15.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 64%, and the wind speed is moderate at 11.8 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value is 0.0 GG, indicating no need for cooling during this period.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of this critical cold snap event.
